_comment: Copy this file to configs/config.json and fill in your real values. config.json is gitignored and will never be committed.
_browser_note: Path to Ungoogled Chromium (or Chrome). Run `python scripts/install_browser.py` to download an isolated copy and get the exact path to paste here.
_apec_max_pages_note: APEC-only. Max pages to crawl per keyword when 'All time' date filter is selected. Date-filtered modes (24h / 7d / 30d) always crawl all pages regardless of this setting.
_cv_path_note: Relative path (from project root) to your base LaTeX CV. Used by the AI agent (optional feature).
_form_data_note: Personal details pre-filled in application forms (used by JobTeaser automation).
